name: KANMONKAI Co., Ltd.
summary: Kanmonkai Co., Ltd. develops, manages, and franchises restaurant stores in Japan and internationally. It operates 40 stores. The company was formerly known as Sakanatei Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kanmonkai Co., Ltd. in March 2001. Kanmonkai Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
